product_overview: AqroSmart is an AI-driven agricultural intelligence platform for Azerbaijan’s agricultural sector, combining farm data, analysis, irrigation guidance, subsidy calculations, and credit scoring into a single system. It helps government officers, farmers, and financial institutions make performance-based decisions using analytics and AI outputs.
core_goals: Replace fixed area-based subsidies with dynamic performance-based calculations
Reduce agricultural water consumption through smart irrigation recommendations
Enable farmer creditworthiness assessment using productivity data
Detect crop diseases early using AI image analysis
Provide a transparent operational dashboard for government and stakeholders

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provides a high-level operational summary of farms, fields, subsidy totals, and system status.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/dashboard to fetch the system summary -> Receive 200 with counts, productivity metrics, and subsidy totals -> Display dashboard KPIs for farms, fields, and regional performance
GET /api/v1/dashboard with an invalid or unavailable backend state -> Receive an error response such as 500 or 503 -> Show a dashboard loading/error state to the user

features.name: Farms Management
features.description: Allows users to browse farm records and create new farms in the system.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/farms to list all farms -> Receive 200 with the farm collection -> Display farms with region, district, and metadata
POST /api/v1/farms with valid farm data -> Receive 201 or 200 with the created farm record -> Farm appears in subsequent GET /api/v1/farms results
POST /api/v1/farms with missing or malformed farm fields -> Receive a validation error such as 400 or 422 -> Display field-level error messages and prevent creation

features.name: Fields Management
features.description: Supports listing agricultural fields and their related operational data.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/fields to list all fields -> Receive 200 with the field collection -> Display field records for browsing and drill-down navigation
GET /api/v1/fields with an unavailable service or database issue -> Receive an error response such as 500 -> Show an error state and prompt the user to retry

features.name: Soil Analysis
features.description: Lists analysis runs used to evaluate field productivity, crop health, and disease risk.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/analysis to list all soil analysis records -> Receive 200 with analysis run data -> Display historical analysis results for monitoring
GET /api/v1/analysis when no data exists or the backend fails -> Receive 200 with an empty list or an error response -> Show either an empty state or an error state accordingly

features.name: Subsidy Management
features.description: Retrieves subsidy recommendation data used to support performance-based subsidy allocation.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/subsidies to retrieve subsidy recommendations -> Receive 200 with subsidy data -> Display base subsidy, multipliers, and final recommended subsidy
GET /api/v1/subsidies with an invalid query context or backend failure -> Receive an error response such as 500 -> Show an error state and prevent users from relying on stale subsidy values

features.name: Irrigation Recommendations
features.description: Provides irrigation data and water optimization guidance for fields.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/irrigation to retrieve irrigation recommendation data -> Receive 200 with recommended water amounts and urgency levels -> Display irrigation actions and savings estimates
GET /api/v1/irrigation when sensor or recommendation data is unavailable -> Receive an error response such as 500 -> Show a fallback message indicating recommendations cannot be loaded

features.name: Credit Scoring
features.description: Retrieves farmer credit score data for banks and other authorized stakeholders.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/credit_score to fetch credit score data -> Receive 200 with score components, final score, and risk tier -> Display the farmer’s financial risk profile and improvement guidance
GET /api/v1/credit_score with missing source data or backend failure -> Receive an error response such as 500 -> Show an error state and avoid presenting incomplete credit scoring results

features.name: Market Simulation
features.description: Returns simulation data for yield and market scenario evaluation.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/simulation to retrieve simulation data -> Receive 200 with active scenario and simulated metrics -> Display current simulation outputs for stakeholders
GET /api/v1/simulation when the simulation state cannot be determined -> Receive an error response such as 500 -> Show a simulation error state and disable downstream scenario comparisons

features.name: Plant Analysis
features.description: Supports AI-based plant and drone image analysis for disease detection.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/plant_analysis to retrieve stored plant analysis data -> Receive 200 with historical image analysis results -> Display disease detections, confidence values, and recommendations

GET /api/v1/plant_analysis when no analyses are available or the backend fails -> Receive an error response such as 500 or an empty response -> Show an empty state or an error state depending on the result

features.name: Credit Scoring
features.description: Operations related to credit score and financial metrics

features.name: Market Simulation
features.description: Operations related to yield and market simulation

features.name: Plant Analysis
features.description: Operations related to plant and drone image analysis
